raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 974 will require all counties to submit an annual report to the legislature on Mental Health Services Act spending on clinical services provided to veterans.",
    "Many veterans are not going to the Department of Veterans Affairs for mental health services.",
    "A 2014 report released by the O.C. Health Care Agency found that an average of 42 veterans committed suicide in Orange County each year between 2009 and 2011.",
    "This average of 42 veteran suicides is more than any other group surveyed.",
    "It is estimated that more than 1 out of 4 Americans suffer from a diagnosable mental disorder in any given year.",
    "Veterans are especially vulnerable to mental health problems."
  ]
}
```
